productDisplayName: Baggit Women Panchnama Enzyme Blue Mobile Pouch
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand, pop it over your shoulder or tuck it away in your bag. Dimensions: 17 cm x 16 cm Created from tough fabric with leather overlays Shoulder strap Two main zippered compartments with fabric inner One zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
